zh.Gartlie, Aberdeen, Scotland: 蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾阿爾迪
zh.lifeSummary: Humphrey de Berkeley於1167年出生在蘇格蘭金加迪爾。他於大約1192年與Agatha在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1225年在蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾享年58歲。

zh-hans.Gartlie, Aberdeen, Scotland: 苏格兰阿爾迪史爾阿爾迪
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Humphrey de Berkeley于1167年出生在苏格兰金加迪爾。他于大约1192年与Agatha在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1225年在苏格兰阿爾迪史爾享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Berkeley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from one or more of the numerous places so named, such as Berkeley in Gloucestershire, named in Old English with be(o)rc ‘birch’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. Compare Scottish Barclay .
Jewish (American): adoption of the English surname (see 1 above) in place of   Berkowitz  .

variants.name: Barclay
meanings: Scottish: habitational name of English origin, from any of several places so called, such as Berkley in Somerset or Berkeley in Gloucestershire, both named in Old English with be(o)rc ‘birch’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

History: The surname was brought to Scotland from southwestern England in the 12th century; Walter de Berchelai or Berkelai was Chamberlain of Scotland in 1165. It was long assumed that they were from the family that held Berkeley Castle in Gloucestershire, but the historian G. W. S. Barrow (1973, The Kingdom of the Scots) adduced evidence that they are more probably from Berkley in Somerset.

variants.name: Berkley
meanings: English: variant of   Berkeley  . Compare Scottish   Barclay  .

nameMeanings.name: Humphrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman name, Hunfrid, of Germanic origin, derived from hun ‘bear-cub, warrior’ + fred, frid ‘peace’. The Norman form absorbed the native Old English form, Hunfrith, which existed in England before the Conquest. The spelling with -ph- reflects classicizing influence. Since the 16th century it has enjoyed a modest popularity in England, having been borne most notably by the youngest son of King Henry IV , the Duke of Gloucester ( 1391–1447 ), known as ‘Duke Humphrey’. He was noted as a patron of literature, and founded what became the Bodleian Library at Oxford. In modern times, probably the most famous bearer has been the film star Humphrey Bogart ( 1899–1957 ).

en.lifeSummary: Humphrey de Berkeley was born in 1167, in Kincardineshire, Scotland. He married Agatha about 1192, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1225, in Aberdeenshire, Scotland, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Humphrey de Berkeley est né en 1167, à Kincardineshire, Écosse. Il a épousé Agatha environ 1192, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1225, à Aberdeenshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Humphrey de Berkeley wurde 1167 in Kincardineshire, Scotland geboren. Er hat um 1192 in Scotland Agatha geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1225 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Aberdeenshire, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Humphrey de Berkeley è nato il nel 1167 nel Kincardineshire, Scotland. Lui sposato Agatha circa 1192, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1225, nel Aberdeenshire, Scotland, all'età di 58 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Humphrey de Berkeleyは1167年にスコットランドキンカーディンエシュアイアで生まれた。約1192年にスコットランドでAgathaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1225年にスコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアで58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Humphrey de Berkeley(은)는 1167년 스컷랜드 킨카딘실르에서 태어났다. 그는 대략 1192년 스컷랜드에서 Agatha(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1225년 스컷랜드 압르디실르에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Humphrey de Berkeley nasceu em 1167, em Kincardineshire, Scotland. Ele casou-se com Agatha aproximadamente 1192, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1225, em Aberdeenshire, Scotland, com 58 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Humphrey de Berkeley родился в 1167 г. в местности кинкардаинешир, Шотландия. Он женился на женщине по имени Agatha около 1192 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1225 г. в местности абирдиншир, Шотландия в возрасте 58 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Humphrey de Berkeley nació en 1167, en Kincardineshire, Scotland. Se casó con Agatha aproximadamente 1192, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1225, en Aberdeenshire, Scotland, a la edad de 58 años.
